steps.name: open-note:start
steps.value: (async()=>{ const app=window.app; if(!app?.vault) throw new Error('no app vault'); app.emulateMobile?.(true); await app.vault.adapter.write("codex-mobile-monaco-probe.md", "# Mobile Monaco Probe\n\n``
